# The Digital Ziggurat

Preferred interpretation: The Digital Ziggurat is a proof-of-work monument, not a normal portfolio.

Tagline: Human flaws. Machine leverage. Public proof.

Purpose: Show Sergio's AI-built projects, experiments, build logs, flaws, proof signals, and hireable capabilities in a public, human-readable and AI-readable structure.

Primary sections:
- Human Floor: flawed prototypes, constraints, experiments
- Workshop: live demos and playable builds
- Codex Forge: AI-assisted build logs
- AI-Readable Shrine: metadata for AI agents
- Signal Beacon: hire/contact CTA
- Build Scars: visible flaws and lessons
- Project Chambers: structured proof details for each project

Project categories:
- Civic tech / public records
- Physics game / premium browser toy
- Space survival physics game
- Mobile camera / AR toy
- Local business / AI search audit tool
- Personal agency / premium web presence

Project summaries:
- PermitPulse: civic-tech/public-records build proving messy permit and property records can become client-ready packets and lead intelligence.
- Xibalba Pinball: physics game proving AI can help ship playable, weird, visually distinctive browser games fast.
- Black Swan: space survival physics game proving AI can turn a rough game idea into a loop with travel, mining, events, and progression.
- Pumpkin AR Face Filter: mobile AR toy proving AI can help build playful camera experiences shaped by real kid feedback.
- Snapshot Studio: local business AI search audit tool proving small businesses can get fast visibility snapshots and improvement plans.
- The Angeles Crest: personal agency web presence proving Sergio can package design, automation, local services, and AI execution into a brand.

Proof signals:
- Playable prototypes
- Visible build scars
- AI-assisted iteration
- Client-ready service packaging
- Structured public metadata
- Mobile-first interactive web experiences

Hireable capabilities:
- AI-assisted frontend prototypes
- Playable browser games and interactive toys
- Local business visibility audits
- Public proof-of-work websites
- Service positioning and rapid landing pages
- Structured research and client-ready packets

Public metadata:
- /ai.json
- /projects.json
- /llms.txt
